        });

    handleExperimentEvent(message) {
        switch (message.type) {
            case 'experiment.created':
            case 'experiment.updated':
            case 'experiment.deleted':
                this.refreshExperiments();
                break;
            case 'run.started':
            case 'run.ended':

                if (experimentId) {
                    this.refreshRuns(experimentId);
                }
                break;
        }
    }
    /**
     * List all experiments
     */
    async listExperiments() {
        const response = await this.backendService.get('/experiments');
        if (response.data) {
            this.experiments = response.data.experiments;
            this.onExperimentsChangedEmitter.fire(this.experiments);
            return this.experiments;
        }
        return [];
    }

     * Refresh experiments from server
     */

        await this.listExperiments();
